title: Naval Science and Technology Future Force Magazine
description: This is the official web site for the Naval Science & Technology Future Force magazine, managed by the Office of Naval Research on behalf of the naval research community.
text: As reflected in the Navy's recently released Science and Technology Strategy, areas of critical importance where the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps must maintain dominance are autonomy and unmanned platforms. From seafloor to space, unmanned underwater, surface, and aerial vehicles are critical enablers to mission success. This edition of Future Force Magazine touches on progress on those key technologies. This edition also features groundbreaking work being done by and in support to the Marine Corps.
